task: Using only the embedded packet, produce a launch-quality substrate warpage compensation recipe that recommends process compensation(s) within the given process limits. Convert the embedded packet into an auditable evidence table with record-level citations and governing values, include validation checks and sensitivity notes (using sensitivity_shift_pct), list unresolved assumptions, flag any record or finding that should be marked needs_review (per confidence, provenance, or contradiction rules), and deliver two artifacts: a formulas-executable spreadsheet (substrate_warpage_recipe.xlsx) and a process change document (process_change.md).
